! 
! Title: BlockingMachine AdGuard DNS Filter List
! Description: DNS rewrite filter rules for blocking ads, trackers, and annoyances at the DNS level. Enhances privacy by preventing unwanted connections with custom DNS responses.
! Homepage: https://github.com/greigh/BlockingMachine
! Last modified: 2025-02-27 05:06:05
! Number of rules: 73406
!
